actions.expression:
SELECT cymxsheet.gcmc 
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
WHERE ((cymx.rid=cymxsheet.pid) 
  AND (cymx.fphm=[开票通知.外销发票号]) 
  AND (cymxsheet.tsl<>'')
  and (cymxsheet.tsl<>0)) 
GROUP BY cymxsheet.gcmc 
ORDER BY cymxsheet.gcmc ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT cymxsheet.sid,
       cymxsheet.zhwbgpm,
       cymxsheet.zjz,
       cymxsheet.hgjldw,
       cymxsheet.gcjg,
       cymxsheet.gczj,
       cymxsheet.tsl,
       cymxsheet.chsl,
       cymxsheet.jldw,
       cymxsheet.gcmc,
       cymxsheet.dq1
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
WHERE (cymx.rid=cymxsheet.pid) 
  AND (cymx.fphm=[开票通知.业务发票]) 
  AND (cymxsheet.gcmc=[开票通知.生产厂家]) 
  AND (cymxsheet.tsl<>'0') 
ORDER BY cymxsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT zlbinvoice.sid,
       zlbinvoice.SerialIDOfInvoice,
       zlbinvoice.NameOfSeller,
       TaxIncludedAmountInFigures,
       TotalAmountExcludingTax,
       TotalTaxAmount,
       kpgcsh,
       CodeOfInvoice,
       DateOfIssue,
       UniqueCodeOfInvoice
FROM zlbinvoice 
WHERE (zlbinvoice.NameOfPurchaser=[开票通知.我司抬头]) 
  AND ((zlbinvoice.fis_use="") 
  OR (zlbinvoice.fis_use="否") 
  OR (zlbinvoice.fis_use is null)) 
ORDER BY zlbinvoice.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT kaiptzsheet1.sid,
       kaiptz.chrq,
       kaiptzsheet1.zsl,
       kaiptzsheet1.cghbdm,
       kaiptzsheet1.ywrya,
       kaiptzsheet1.fphm,
       kaiptzsheet1.ysfp,
       kaiptzsheet1.dpdd,
       kaiptzsheet1.sccj,
       kaiptzsheet1.zwpm,
       kaiptzsheet1.kpwy,
       kaiptzsheet1.gczj,
       kaiptzsheet1.ywbm,
       kaiptzsheet1.kpgc,
       kaiptzsheet1.cght,
       kaiptzsheet1.wstt,
       kaiptzsheet1.bzsm,
       kaiptzsheet1.sfdh,
       kaiptzsheet1.gzsh,
       kaiptzsheet1.cz,
       kaiptzsheet1.fkxq,
       kaiptzsheet1.szxq,
       kaiptzsheet1.dq,
       kaiptzsheet1.zkfy1
FROM kaiptz,kaiptzsheet1 
WHERE (kaiptz.rid=kaiptzsheet1.pid) 
  AND (kaiptzsheet1.kpxh=[开票通知.资料合并.开票序号]) 
ORDER BY kaiptzsheet1.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT zlbinvoice.sid,
       zlbinvoice.NumberOfInvoice,
       zlbinvoice.CodeOfInvoice,
       zlbinvoice.TaxIncludedAmountInFigures,
       zlbinvoice.DateOfIssue,
       zlbinvoice.TotalAmountExcludingTax,
       zlbinvoice.TotalTaxAmount,
       zlbinvoice.kpgcsh,
       zlbinvoice.UniqueCodeOfInvoice
FROM zlbinvoice 
WHERE (zlbinvoice.NameOfSeller=[开票通知.开票工厂]) 
  AND (zlbinvoice.NameOfPurchaser=[开票通知.我方公司]) 
  AND ((zlbinvoice.fis_use="") 
  OR (zlbinvoice.fis_use="否") 
  OR (zlbinvoice.fis_use is null)) 
ORDER BY zlbinvoice.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-合同总额
actions.caption: 计算-合同总额
actions.expression: [开票通知.产品资料.出货数量]*[开票通知.产品资料.采购单价]
actions.output: 开票通知.产品资料.合同总额

actions.name: 计算-数量合计
actions.caption: 计算-数量合计
actions.expression: [开票通知.产品资料.出货数量]

actions.name: 计算-箱数合计
actions.caption: 计算-箱数合计
actions.expression: [开票通知.产品资料.箱  数}

actions.name: 计算-采购总额
actions.caption: 计算-采购总额
actions.expression: [开票通知.产品资料.合同总额]

actions.name: 计算-外销合计
actions.caption: 计算-外销合计
actions.expression: [开票通知.产品资料.外销金额]

actions.name: 计算-折扣费用
actions.caption: 计算-折扣费用
actions.expression: [开票通知.产品资料.折扣费用]

actions.name: 计算-预付合计
actions.caption: 计算-预付合计
actions.expression: [开票通知.产品资料.预付金额]

actions.name: 计算-已审请合计
actions.caption: 计算-已审请合计
actions.expression: [开票通知.产品资料.已审请金额]

actions.name: 计算-报关数量
actions.caption: 计算-报关数量
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.出货数]/[开票通知.资料合并.出货总量]*[开票通知.资料合并.报关总量]
actions.output: 开票通知.资料合并.报关数量

actions.name: 计算-资料合并-实际开票总额
actions.caption: 计算-资料合并-实际开票总额
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.合同总额]-[开票通知.资料合并.相关杂费]
actions.output: 开票通知.资料合并.实际开票总额

actions.name: 计算-资料合并-相关杂费
actions.caption: 计算-资料合并-相关杂费
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.开票零头]
actions.output: 开票通知.资料合并.相关杂费

actions.name: 计算-资料合并-采购单价
actions.caption: 计算-资料合并-采购单价
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.实际开票总额]/1.03/[开票通知.资料合并.报关数量]
actions.output: 开票通知.资料合并.采购单价

actions.name: 计算-非认证金额
actions.caption: 计算-非认证金额
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.到票金额总]-[开票通知.资料合并.认证金额]
actions.output: 开票通知.资料合并.非认证金额

actions.name: 计算-非认证数量
actions.caption: 计算-非认证数量
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.到票数量总]-[开票通知.资料合并.认证数量]
actions.output: 开票通知.资料合并.非认证数量

actions.name: 计算-资料合并.实际开票总额
actions.caption: 计算-资料合并.实际开票总额
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.合同总额]-[开票通知.资料合并.相关杂费]
actions.output: 开票通知.资料合并.实际开票总额

actions.name: 计算-相关杂费
actions.caption: 计算-相关杂费
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.开票零头]

actions.name: 计算-资料合并.采购单价
actions.caption: 计算-资料合并.采购单价
actions.expression: [开票通知.资料合并.实际开票总额]/1.03/[开票通知.资料合并.报关数量]
actions.output: 开票通知.资料合并.采购单价
